span.p: Component View: Archkit Hybrid Microservices System - Product Service

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Single entry point untuk
semua klien eksternal.
Memproxy HTTP request ke
service yang tepat
menggunakan HttpService
(keep-alive). Terhubung ke
Kafka sebagai microservice
listener.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Event streaming platform
untuk komunikasi asinkron
antar service. Topics:
product.created,
product.updated,
product.deleted,
sales.transaction-completed,
inventory.updated.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Database isolasi untuk
Product Service. Tabel:
products.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
REST endpoint handler:
POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE
/products. Mendelegasikan ke
CommandBus dan QueryBus.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Mendispatch command ke
handler yang tepat:
CreateProductCommand,
UpdateProductCommand,
DeleteProductCommand.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Mendispatch query ke handler
yang tepat: GetProductsQuery,
GetProductByIdQuery.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Membuat produk baru di DB
lalu memanggil
ProductProducer.emitProductCreated
(fire-and-forget).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Update produk di DB lalu emit
product.updated ke Kafka
untuk menjaga sales-service
cache tetap fresh.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Hapus produk dari DB lalu
emit product.deleted agar
sales-service dan
inventory-service
membersihkan cache/record
terkait.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Ambil semua produk dari DB
via TypeORM repository.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Ambil satu produk by UUID
dari DB. Throw
NotFoundException jika tidak
ada.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Fields: id (UUID PK), name,
price (decimal), description,
category. Extends BaseEntity
(createdAt, updatedAt,
version).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Diinjeksikan via
@InjectRepository(Product).
CRUD operations langsung ke
MySQL.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Kafka producer. Connects to
Kafka broker on init.
Methods: emitProductCreated,
emitProductUpdated,
emitProductDeleted. Semua
fire-and-forget.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Registrasi ClientKafka dengan
KAFKA_SERVICE token. Consumer
group: product-consumer.
Brokers dari env
KAFKA_BROKERS.
